title: Sātkhira Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sātkhira, with a Z-Score of +3.40. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Sātkhira is causing significant disruptions to daily life. 
 The high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.9 GG, are expected to continue, with humidity levels at 81% and wind speeds of 17.3 km/h. 
 The city's infrastructure is under strain, with the heat wave having a major impact on various sectors.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
